title: eurya cuneata
intro: Eurya cuneata, also known as the Wedge-leafed Eurya or Cuneate Eurya, is a plant species belonging to the family Theaceae. Traditionally, Eurya cuneata has been used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eurya cuneata include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Eurya cuneata is often used in tea or tincture form, and can also be applied topically to the skin as a paste or salve.
